description: Checkout-safe manifest for mock evaluation fixture references.

entries.description: Small JSON scenario fixture used as a provenance-citable local reference.
Stable remote reference to the same tiny checkout fixture pinned by commit.

host_acquisition_steps: Use checkout fixtures already present in the repository for local-fixture entries.
For host-asset entries, prepare assets outside the repository and record a host-verified digest before citing results.
license: MIT for checkout fixtures; host-owned assets require operator verification

metadata.claim_boundary: This manifest cites references for deterministic evaluation evidence only; it does not store datasets.

name: Mock Evaluation Fixture Manifest

provenance.source: WorldForge checkout fixtures and host-owned external references

safety.notes: No raw robot logs, credentials, signed URLs, or private endpoints are stored.
